purpose: Materialize the active MainRegimeV3 root crosswalk after the paper/GitHub source refresh and user correction.

required_label_semantics: positive drift or persistent upside regime
expansion/risk-on behavior, not only a one-bar up move
downstream action differs from consolidation or crisis
forbidden_shortcuts: counting naked V2 Bull evidence without expansion remap
counting TrendExpansion child packet as parent completion by wording

required_label_semantics: negative drift or persistent downside regime
not merely a crisis tail event
forbidden_shortcuts: counting naked V2 Bear evidence without downside-expansion remap
counting ordinary drawdown or volatility alone as BearExpansion

required_label_semantics: directional strategies are suppressed, resized, or replaced
not just low volatility without range structure
forbidden_shortcuts: counting RangeConsolidation child packet as parent completion by wording
using only low ADX/low volatility without held-out source labels

required_label_semantics: stress/crash/dislocation state with separate sizing or abstain behavior
can dominate direction and ordinary bear evidence
must be validated beyond display naming
forbidden_shortcuts: counting naked V2 Crisis evidence without stress/dislocation remap
using a child ExtremeStress packet as completion without parent audit

required_label_semantics: engineered price/action lifecycle or market-abuse event
direct event, social/event, L2/L3/order-lifecycle, wash-trade, spoofing/layering, or comparable labeled evidence
routes to suppress, abstain, cooldown, or special handling before any strategy selection
forbidden_shortcuts: using OHLCV-only sweep/session/thin-liquidity proxies as accepted manipulation
counting one direct-event variety as all direct-manipulation coverage

residual_root.handling: abstain/default guardrail, not a completion root

next_action: Rerun the attachability/full-coverage disposition matrix against the MainRegimeV3 roots and keep missing source-label cells blocked.
